title: Finding a Street
scene: 你在街上迷路了，向路人问路。

turns.cn: 打扰一下，请问百老汇大街怎么走？
turns.en: Excuse me, how do I get to Broadway?

turns.cn: 往前直走两个路口，然后右转。
turns.en: Go straight for two blocks, then turn right.
How long does it take on foot?
About ten minutes.
Is there a subway station nearby?

turns.cn: 有，百老汇大街那头就有一个。
turns.en: Yes, there's one at the end of Broadway.
Thank you so much!

title: Left or Right
scene: 你在十字路口，不确定该往哪边走。

turns.cn: 不好意思，中央车站是在这边吗？
turns.en: Sorry, is Grand Central Station this way?

turns.cn: 不是，你得往回走，在第二个红绿灯左转。
turns.en: No, you need to go back and turn left at the second light.
The road on the left?

turns.cn: 对，一直走到底就能看到。
turns.en: Yes, keep going until you see it.
Is it far? I'm in a hurry.

turns.cn: 走路十五分钟，打车五分钟。
turns.en: Fifteen minutes walking, five by taxi.
Got it. Thanks a lot!

title: Inside a Building
scene: 你在一栋办公大楼里找会议室。

turns.en: Hi, where is conference room 1208?
Twelfth floor. Turn right out of the elevator.
Do I need to sign in as a visitor?

turns.cn: 请在这本子上写名字和公司。
turns.en: Please write your name and company in this book.
Which floor are the restrooms on?
On every floor, next to the elevators.
Thank you!

turns.cn: 请问苹果专卖店怎么走？
turns.en: Excuse me, how do I get to the Apple Store?
Third floor. Take the escalator up and turn left.
Where's the food court?
Fourth floor, right across from the escalator.
What time does the mall close?
Nine PM.
Okay, thanks!

title: Which Bus to Take
scene: 你在公交站，不确定该坐哪趟车。

turns.cn: 你好，去唐人街坐哪路车？
turns.en: Hi, which bus goes to Chinatown?
The M15, heading downtown.
Do I get on at this stop?
Yes. It comes about every five minutes.
Which stop should I get off at?

turns.cn: 运河街，我到了可以提醒你。
turns.en: Canal Street. I can let you know when we get there.
That would be great. Thank you!

title: Completely Lost
scene: 手机没电了，你完全不知道自己在哪。

turns.cn: 警官您好，我迷路了，能帮我吗？
turns.en: Officer, I'm lost. Could you help me?
Where are you trying to go? Do you have an address?

turns.cn: 我住万豪酒店，手机没电了。
turns.en: I'm staying at the Marriott. My phone died.

turns.cn: 酒店就在六个街区外，我指给您看。
turns.en: The hotel is six blocks from here. I'll point you the way.
Can I walk there?

turns.cn: 可以，沿这条街一直走，看到大钟楼就快到了。
turns.en: Yes. Go straight down this street until you see the big clock tower.
Thank you very much for your help!
